subcodes.first_line: Thou, servant of Bahá, hadst voiced thy complaint and recounted the story of being deprived of spiritual sustenance for the span of a year [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بندهٴ بها شکایت با حکایت از انقطاع مائده روحانى نموده بودی که یک سال است
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters
